name: Metadata List
description: Key-value definition list for displaying entity attributes.

items.description: Associative array of label => value pairs

default.description: Optional custom content (alternative to items prop)

decision_rule: Use in detail/view pages to display entity attributes as key-value pairs. Ideal for sidebar metadata in SplitLayout.

filament_equivalent.note: In Filament infoolists, use TextEntry, IconEntry, etc.
